title: BossFeatureSideInput Object
description: This class defines the methods and properties that pertain to the definition of a single side of boss feature

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: clearRibExtent
methods.description: Clears rib extent types for all position points.

methods.name: setBlank
methods.description: Set boss shape into blank constant diameter shank with no hole.

methods.name: setCounterbore
methods.description: Set boss shape into constant diameter shank with counterbore hole.

methods.name: setCountersink
methods.description: Set boss shape into constant diameter shank with countersink hole.

methods.name: setRibExtent
methods.description: Set rib extent type for particular rib for position point provided.

methods.name: setSimple
methods.description: Set boss shape into constant diameter shank with simple hole.

properties.name: alignmentDepth
properties.description: Get or set alignment depth.

properties.name: alignmentDiameter
properties.description: Get or set alignment diameter.

properties.name: alignmentDraftAngle
properties.description: Get or set alignment draft angle.

properties.name: alignmentRootRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of the boss alignment root.

properties.name: alignmentTipRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of the boss alignment tip.

properties.name: alignmentType
properties.description: Get or set boss alignment shape. This usually corresponds to the alignment shape of the boss counterpart.

properties.name: diameter
properties.description: Get or set boss shank diameter.

properties.name: draftAngle
properties.description: Get or set shank draft angle.

properties.name: holeCountersinkAngle
properties.description: Get or set countersink angle for countersink hole. This input is used only for countersink hole.

properties.name: holeDepth
properties.description: Get or set hole depth with respect to hole extent type. If hole extent type is set to BossHoleThrough parameter is ignored. If hole extent type is BossBlindFull the parameter is a distance from farthest face. If hole extent type is set to BossBlindDepth the parameter is a distance from start face of the hole.

properties.name: holeDiameter
properties.description: Get or set hole diameter.

properties.name: holeDraftAngle
properties.description: Get or set hole draft angle.

properties.name: holeEndRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of the hole end.

properties.name: holeExtentType
properties.description: Get or set hole extent this feature represents. For top side only through hole extent is accepted.

properties.name: holeMajorDepth
properties.description: Get or set major hole depth for counterbore and countersink hole or material thickness under screw head based on hole orientation in a boss feature. This input is ignored for blank boss or boss with simple hole.

properties.name: holeMajorDiameter
properties.description: Get or set major hole diameter for counterbore or countersink hole. This input is ignored for blank boss or boss with simple hole.

properties.name: holeMajorDraftAngle
properties.description: Get or set major hole draft angle for counterbore and countersink hole. This input is ignored for blank boss or boss with simple hole.

properties.name: holeMajorRootRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of major hole counterbore root.

properties.name: holeMajorTipRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of major hole counterbore.

properties.name: holeStartRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of the hole start.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: offsetClearance
properties.description: Get or set offset clearance as additional small offset from the selected parting plane and position point.

properties.name: ribChamferAngle
properties.description: Get or set rib chamfer angle. This input is used only for rib with chamfer.

properties.name: ribCount
properties.description: Get or set number of ribs.

properties.name: ribCutSize
properties.description: Get or set size of rib chamfer or fillet.

properties.name: ribDraftAngle
properties.description: Get or set ribs draft angle.

properties.name: ribLength
properties.description: Get or set ribs length measured from the shank axis.

properties.name: ribOffset
properties.description: Get or set ribs offset from the top face or alignment face.

properties.name: ribOuterDraftAngle
properties.description: Get or set rib outer draft angle.

properties.name: ribRootRadius
properties.description: Get or set rib base root blend radius.

properties.name: ribRotation
properties.description: Get or set rotation angle of the first rib from the reference vector. Reference vector is X-axis of the parent sketch from selected sketch point(s).

properties.name: ribThickness
properties.description: Get or set ribs thickness.

properties.name: ribTipRadius
properties.description: Get or set rib outer tip blend radius.

properties.name: ribTotalAngle
properties.description: Get or set total angle for ribs distribution. Default is 360 deg.

properties.name: ribType
properties.description: Type of boss ribs this feature represents.

properties.name: rootRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of the boss shank and participant body.

properties.name: tipRadius
properties.description: Get or set blend radius of the boss shank top parting face.

related_samples.name: Boss Feature Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating a new boss feature

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.alignmentDepth

# Set the value of the property.
bossFeatureSideInput_var.alignmentDepth = propertyValue

classType.title: BossFeatureSideInput.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

syntax.python: returnValue = adsk.fusion.BossFeatureSideInput.classType()
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = adsk::fusion::BossFeatureSideInput::classType();

classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

clearRibExtent.title: BossFeatureSideInput.clearRibExtent Method
clearRibExtent.description: Clears rib extent types for all position points.

syntax.python: returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.clearRibExtent()
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var->clearRibExtent();

setBlank.title: BossFeatureSideInput.setBlank Method
setBlank.description: Set boss shape into blank constant diameter shank with no hole.

syntax.python: returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.setBlank(diameter)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var->setBlank(diameter);

parameters.name: diameter
parameters.description: The outside diameter for the boss feature shank.

setCounterbore.title: BossFeatureSideInput.setCounterbore Method
setCounterbore.description: Set boss shape into constant diameter shank with counterbore hole.

syntax.python: returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.setCounterbore(diameter, holeDiameter, holeMajorDiameter, depth)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var->setCounterbore(diameter, holeDiameter, holeMajorDiameter, depth);

parameters.name: diameter
parameters.description: The outside diameter for the boss feature shank.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: With respect to hole orientation in the boss feature the parameter is either the counterbore depth or thickness of the material under the screw head.

related_samples.name: Boss Feature Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating a new boss feature

setCountersink.title: BossFeatureSideInput.setCountersink Method
setCountersink.description: Set boss shape into constant diameter shank with countersink hole.

syntax.python:
# Uses no optional arguments.
returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.setCountersink(diameter, holeDiameter, holeMajorDiameter, depth)

# Uses optional arguments.
returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.setCountersink(diameter, holeDiameter, holeMajorDiameter, depth, countersinkAngle)

parameters.name: diameter
parameters.description: The outside diameter for the boss feature shank.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: With respect to hole orientation in the boss feature the parameter is either the counterbore depth or thickness of the material under the screw head.

parameters.name: countersinkAngle
parameters.description: Optional parameter for hole countersink angle. If not specified it is set to 90 deg.   This is an optional argument whose default value is null.

related_samples.name: Boss Feature Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating a new boss feature

setRibExtent.title: BossFeatureSideInput.setRibExtent Method
setRibExtent.description: Set rib extent type for particular rib for position point provided.

syntax.python: returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.setRibExtent(position, ribExtentTypes)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var->setRibExtent(position, ribExtentTypes);

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: Position point object for the rib extent types provided

parameters.name: ribExtentTypes
parameters.description: Vector of BossRibExtentTypes for individual rib based on rib count input.

related_samples.name: Boss Feature Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating a new boss feature

setSimple.title: BossFeatureSideInput.setSimple Method
setSimple.description: Set boss shape into constant diameter shank with simple hole.

syntax.python: returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var.setSimple(diameter, holeDiameter)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = bossFeatureSideInput_var->setSimple(diameter, holeDiameter);

parameters.name: diameter
parameters.description: The outside diameter for the boss feature shank.
